title: agropyron trachycaulum var. latiglume
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum var. latiglume, also known as big bluegrass, is a type of grass species native to North America, characterized by its blue-green foliage and broad leaf blades. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agropyron trachycaulum var. latiglume include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal purposes.
